name: Creamy Chicken Salad with Mango Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 ripe mangos, peeled and cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken broth in a pan, add chicken breasts; cover and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes or until chicken is tender. Drain and cool.
2. Add rice gradually to a large pot of boiling water. Boil rapidly, uncovered, for 10 minutes or until rice is tender. Drain and cool.
3. Cut mango into thin strips. Slice the chicken into pieces.
4. Combine all ingredients for the mango dressing in a blender until smooth.
5. In a bowl, combine cooked rice, chopped green onions, and French dressing.
6. Place the rice mixture on plates. Top with sliced chicken and drizzle with the mango dressing.
